mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diaries (user_id, content, content_text, written_date, visibility, analysis_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{contentText}, #{writtenDate}, COALESCE(#{visibility}, 'PRIVATE'), CASE WHEN #{confirm} THEN 'PENDING' ELSE 'DRAFT' END) ON CONFLICT (user_id, written_date) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL DO UPDATE SET content = EXCLUDED.content, content_text = EXCLUDED.content_text, visibility = EXCLUDED.visibility, analysis_status = CASE WHEN #{confirm} THEN 'PENDING' ELSE diaries.analysis_status END, updated_at = now() WHERE diaries.analysis_status = 'DRAFT' RETURNING id, (xmax = 0) AS inserted
mapper.select: SELECT id, share_token::text AS share_token, content, content_text, written_date, visibility, analysis_status, primary_emotion, background_color, text_color, accent_color, ai_comment, ai_title, mood_emoji FROM diaries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND written_date = #{date} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, share_token::text AS share_token, content, content_text, written_date, visibility, analysis_status, primary_emotion, background_color, text_color, accent_color, ai_comment, ai_title, mood_emoji FROM diaries WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT d.id AS id, d.content_text AS content, d.written_date AS written_date, d.analysis_status AS analysis_status, (SELECT op->'insert'->>'image' FROM jsonb_array_elements(d.content::jsonb -> 'ops') WITH ORDINALITY AS t(op, ord) WHERE op->'insert'->>'image' IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ord LIMIT 1) AS thumbnail_url, (SELECT count(*)::int FROM jsonb_array_elements(d.content::jsonb -> 'ops') AS op WHERE op->'insert'->>'image' IS NOT NULL) AS image_count FROM diaries d WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(d.written_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{yearMonth} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY d.written_date DESC, d.id DESC

SELECT to_char(written_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, analysis_status AS analysis_status, primary_emotion AS primary_emotion, mood_emoji AS mood_emoji FROM diaries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(written_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{yearMonth} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY written_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE diaries SET content = #{content}, content_text = #{contentText}, visibility = #{visibility}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND analysis_status = 'DRAFT'
mapper.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN f.requester_id = #{viewerId} THEN f.addressee_id ELSE f.requester_id END FROM friendships f WHERE f.status = 'ACCEPTED' AND #{viewerId} IN (f.requester_id, f.addressee_id)

NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM friendships bf WHERE bf.status = 'BLOCKED' AND LEAST(bf.requester_id, bf.addressee_id) = LEAST(#{viewerId}, d.user_id) AND GREATEST(bf.requester_id, bf.addressee_id) = GREATEST(#{viewerId}, d.user_id) )
mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS id, u.uuid::text AS author_uuid, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.profile_image_url AS author_profile_image_url, d.content AS content, d.content_text AS content_text, d.written_date AS written_date, d.visibility AS visibility, d.primary_emotion AS primary_emotion, d.background_color AS background_color, d.text_color AS text_color, d.accent_color AS accent_color, d.ai_comment AS ai_comment, d.ai_title AS ai_title, d.mood_emoji AS mood_emoji, d.reaction_count AS reaction_count, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM diary_reactions r WHERE r.diary_id = d.id AND r.user_id = #{viewerId}) AS reacted_by_me FROM diaries d JOIN users u ON u.id = d.user_id WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND ( d.user_id = #{viewerId} OR ( d.analysis_status <> 'DRAFT' AND ( d.visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR (d.visibility = 'FRIENDS' AND d.user_id IN ()) ) ) ) AND

SELECT u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.profile_image_url AS author_profile_image_url, d.content AS content, d.content_text AS content_text, d.written_date AS written_date, d.primary_emotion AS primary_emotion, d.background_color AS background_color, d.text_color AS text_color, d.accent_color AS accent_color, d.ai_comment AS ai_comment, d.ai_title AS ai_title, d.mood_emoji AS mood_emoji FROM diaries d JOIN users u ON u.id = d.user_id WHERE d.share_token = #{shareToken}::uuid AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.analysis_status <> 'DRAFT' AND d.visibility <> 'PRIVATE'
